rules.rule_text:
rule Astris
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "Astris system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "[Network]" ascii
		$x2 = "Public IP Address:" ascii
		$x3 = "Internet Provider:" ascii
		$x4 = "Product Key:" ascii
		$x5 = "Antiviruses:" ascii
		$x6 = "[Machine]" ascii
		$x7 = "Build:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
